zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Nevers於大約1029年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，他的父親Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre30歲，母親Havoise de France27歲。他於1140年與Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1100年6月26日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在法國布格尼艾福內維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Nevers于大约1029年出生在法国布格尼艾福內維斯时，他的父亲Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre30岁，母亲Havoise de France27岁。他于1140年与Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1100年6月26日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在法国布格尼艾福內維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Nevers was born about 1029, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, his father, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, was 30 and his mother, Havoise de France, was 27. He married Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre in 1140. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 26 June 1100, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Nevers est né environ 1029, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Havoise de France, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre en 1140. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1100, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Nevers um 1029 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre 30 und seine Mutter Havoise de France 27. Er hat 1140 Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juni 1100 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Nevers è nato il circa 1029 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Havoise de France, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre nel 1140. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1100, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Neversが約1029年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerreは30歳，母Havoise de Franceは27歳であった。1140年にIda Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1100年6月26日に故郷で72歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Nevers(이)가 대략 1029년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoise de France(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1140년 Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1100년 6월 26일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Nevers nasceu aproximadamente 1029, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Havoise de France, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre em 1140. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de junho de 1100, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Nevers родился около 1029 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Havoise de France, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre в 1140 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июня 1100 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция.

sm.from 1040 to 1098: mai le 1040 e o'o I le 1098

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Nevers nació aproximadamente 1029, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Havoise de France, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre en 1140. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1100, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia.
